command: Use the repo skill guide to explain the current Stage 1 behavior in this repository. Include the shared config path, shared sessions path, reviewer backend behavior, the downstream exec -> polish -> docs -> security -> delivery lifecycle, the supported clean stop points before-polish/before-docs/before-security, the real Codex semantics for quality_focus and skip_quality_polish, and the rule that Codex Stage 1 stays in a single orchestrator-owned workspace instead of letting the executor create hidden worktrees.
